impacts.statement: Flooding begins along Route 8 from the Naugatuck Town Line downstream to the Seymour Town Line.
The river level just touches the underside of the bridge on Bridge Street.
Flooding begins in the upstream towns of Waterbury and Naugatuck.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
